name: Granite Masters Of Nashville
description_short: Granite Masters Of Nashville is a credit repair provider based in Nashville, Tennessee. Rated 4.8/5 with 299 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Granite Masters Of Nashville is a credit repair provider serving clients in Nashville, Tennessee. With 299 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, Granite Masters Of Nashville has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a countertop contractor, natural stone supplier, Granite Masters Of Nashville provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Nashville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Granite Masters Of Nashville operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Nashville, Tennessee area who are considering Granite Masters Of Nashville should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
